commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d1181c6898837abb5abcc3bb4d949f58fb234d6a)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an experimental `localModelLeanProfile` config key for agent defaults and per-agent settings, implements `basic` and `strict` local-model tool filtering, updates schema/help/docs, and adds focused tests.

PR surface: Source +44, Tests +232, Docs +21. Total +297 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature/config PR rather than a bug report. Source inspection and the PR tests show the new strict profile path, but there is no current-main failure to reproduce.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is needed because this draft/protected maintainer PR adds a new config contract; the docs fix is mechanical, but the API decision is not a repair-lane task.

target.title: feat(agents): add strict local model lean profile
target.body:
## Summary

- Add `localModelLeanProfile: "basic" | "strict"` under agent experimental config.
- Preserve existing `localModelLean: true` behavior as the default `basic` profile.
- Put the broader local-model trim behind explicit `localModelLeanProfile: "strict"`; strict mode keeps a closed coding/status allowlist, including the paired code-mode `exec`/`wait` controls.

Related https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/87617.
Related https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599.

## Verification

- `node scripts/docs-list.js`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/config/config.schema-regressions.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts --reporter=dot` - passed, 88 tests across 2 shards.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/config/config.schema-regressions.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/schema.labels.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-runtime.ts`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed`: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_eca76df176e9`, slug `violet-barnacle`, run `run_ee64553d5a5a`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit 0, `leaseStopped=true`, lanes `core`, `coreTests`, `docs`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: smaller local-model agents can opt into a stricter tool surface without changing what existing `localModelLean: true` users get.

Real environment tested: local linked OpenClaw worktree for focused source, schema, and docs proof; AWS Crabbox Linux changed-gate runner for `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs` lanes.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/config/config.schema-regressions.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 45m --ttl 90m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.

Evidence after fix: focused tests passed 88/88; docs inventory, docs format, docs MDX, oxfmt, diff whitespace, autoreview, and AWS Crabbox changed gate all passed on rebased head `d1181c68988`.

Observed result after fix: `localModelLean: true` still defaults to the original `basic` trim, `localModelLeanProfile: "strict"` is ignored unless lean mode is enabled, and strict mode filters the visible tool surface to the minimal coding/status set.

What was not tested: A live Ollama/API small-model agent turn was not run for this PR; live model compatibility is covered by the separate small-model matrix work.
target.author: vincentkoc
